title: Cow Milk
description: Makes cows dispense milk as a liquid over a set interval
body:
# Cow Milk
My first attempt with mixins, brings you this abomination!

Cows now dispense milk over a set interval, which can be specified (in ticks) in a new gamerule!

Not meant to be taken seriously, and is simply meant to be a joke.

#### I don't know if this requires Fabric API or not, but if it doesn't work, then just install it.
